what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an attachment identifier, its channel, an attachment type, and a target board item URI with a timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It references a target board item using the URI scheme board://item-c33f748d.
The attachment_type is board_items and the channel is dragnet-development.
It includes an ISO-8601 added timestamp.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI (board://item-c33f748d).
There is no payload or explanatory body beyond metadata.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Uses a URI-style reference to link to another ledger entity.
concerns: The file contains no actual attachment content or payload.
The meaning of the referenced board item is not explainable from this file alone.
No author or provenance information is present.
notes: A bare metadata stub linking attachment att-c2003281 to board item item-c33f748d in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What does board item item-c33f748d represent?
What content or artifact is this attachment supposed to hold?
Who added this attachment and for what reason?
purpose_vs_actual: The metadata implies it should record an attachment to a board item, but the file only stores the linkage and timestamp with no attached content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a timestamped association between an attachment record and a specific board item within a development channel.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme for the target reference is a notable linking convention.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed link between an attachment identifier and a board item in a specific channel, which supports traceability and cross-referencing in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file that links attachment att-c2003281 to board item board://item-c33f748d in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an attachment of type board_items was associated with a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel at a known time.
